rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN REALTY, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY et al VS. WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 19, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK's DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continue to August 8, 2012. Plaintiff to serve and provide courtesy copy of opposition by July 20, 2012 by 4PM and substantive reply by August 1, 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHINEDU L. CHUKU et al VS. CHASE HOME FINANCE LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 19, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. First cause of action, sustain with leave to amend see Nymark; Second cause of action, overrule, moving party provides no binding authority that defendants not subject to ACT; Third through seventh causes of action, overrule. Pulver not applicable; Eighth cause of action, overrule. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts to over come Statue of Limitations; Ninth cause of action, sustain with leave to amend to allege breached contract provision and if second cause of action must so allege; Tenth cause of action overrule; Eleventh cause of action, sustain with leave to amend to allege outrageous conduct; Twelfth cause of action, overrule, sufficiently plead; Thirteenth cause of action overrule; Fourteenth cause of action, sustain without leave to amend; and Fifteenth cause of action, sustain with leave to amend to allege facts showing "accounts are so complicated that action at law impracticable." = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FV-I INC., FOR THE BENEFIT OF THE MSM LOAN TRUST VS. MIGUEL CORDERO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Withdraw And Amend Deemed Admissions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 19, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANT MIGUEL CORDERO'S motion To Withdraw And Amend Deemed Admissions. Hearing required re: defendant's opposition at June 18, 2012 hearing for court to determine if this is 1008 motion and if Wilcox applies. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TRUE COMPASS, LLC VS. OSCAR ROSALES
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 19, 2012, line 3. PLAINTIFF TRUE COMPASS, LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Grant, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERICA MARKHAM et al VS. LESLIE WOOLSEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 19, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT LESLIE WOOLSEY's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. Defendant improperly raises question of fact. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, NA VS. BRITTANICA BRANNON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 19, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT BRITTANICA BRANNON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. Moving party fails to set forth proper basis for demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARGARET NARRON AS TRUSTEE OF THE NARRON FAMILY VS. CACEY GRAY AKA NIC GRAY et al
